name: Fridge Water Bottle Organizer - Brightroom™
description:
Keep water bottles organized in one spot with the Fridge Water Bottle Organizer from Brightroom™. This water bottle organizer features an open front and top for easy bottle storage. It is tall enough to hold two layers of water bottles and has a stackable design to provide extra space for an additional organizer on top. Made of BPA-free plastic, this water bottle organizer is freezer safe and should be handwashed.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
